title: Dried White Rose Buds, 100% Natural, White Colour
features: Premium Quality: These dried rose buds are 100% natural and of the highest quality, harvested at peak freshness.
Vibrant Colour: An elegant touch to potpourri, bath products, and decorative displays.
Versatile Uses: Suitable for crafting, aromatherapy, culinary garnishes, or simply for visual appeal in vases and bowls.
Long-Lasting: Properly dried to retain their vivid colour and aroma for an extended period.
Dimensions: Each package contains approximately 50g of dried white rose buds.
description: Product description Delight your senses with these exquisite white rose buds. Sourced from nature's finest blooms, these 100% natural rose buds have been carefully preserved to maintain their vibrant colour and delicate fragrance. Ideal for food decoration, cocktails, crafting potpourri, infusing teas, or adding a touch of elegance to homemade bath products, these versatile buds offer endless possibilities. Enjoy their captivating aroma and visual appeal in your home, or incorporate them into your artisanal creations for a luxurious, aromatic touch. Presented in a convenient package, these dried rose buds are a must-have for nature enthusiasts and crafters alike. Ingredients dried roses
